## Goal

<!-- What outcome do you want? Describe it from the user's perspective. -->

## Why

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who benefits? What can the user do today, and how is it inadequate? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- One or two paragraphs describing how it could work. UI mock, sketch, or example flow welcome. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why they're worse, or why this one wins. -->

## Out of scope

<!-- Things this request explicitly does NOT include, to keep the discussion focused. -->
